findings.description: Top banner panoramic photograph is severely cropped in HTML, cutting off the lighthouse on the right side which is a prominent visual element of the title slide.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a full-width panoramic photo of a marsh/coastline scene with a clearly visible black-and-white striped lighthouse on the right side. HTML renders only the left portion of this image, completely omitting the lighthouse.

findings.description: Coal/mining operations photograph is rendered as a broken thin vertical sliver, making the image completely illegible.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows a wide panoramic photograph of industrial coal operations with machinery, dirt mounds, and sky. HTML renders this as a narrow vertical strip approximately 20-30 pixels wide, destroying the image content entirely.
